description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 70% cotton and 30% polyester, has a round ribbed neck, short sleeves with print and contrast panelling on the right sleeve extending to the back, printed puma Leaping cat on the left sleeve and graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron on reverseThis puma T-shirt has an exclusive casual style and a great look. The print on the tee ups your style quotient, while the blended fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or tracks and canvas shoes to look your best.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
